strengths: Hands-on Airflow and ETL pipeline development
Experience with Snowflake and modern cloud DWs
Implemented data quality with Great Expectations
weaknesses: No Spark or Databricks experience listed
No explicit experience with marketing ETL tools (Datorama/Improvado/FiveTran)
Limited explicit campaign marketing data integrations
Resume lacks explicit Snowflake/S3 operational SLAs mention
improvement_bullets: Extracted and transformed data from REST APIs and relational databases, building structured, clean datasets that directly supported front-end feature development and reduced UI bugs, leveraging Python and SQL for data validation and synchronization across systems to improve data accuracy by 60%.

Built a production-grade ELT pipeline ingesting Federal Reserve economic data (GDP, CPI, Fed rate, S&P 500) from the FRED API into Google BigQuery using Python, Airflow, dbt, and GCS, automating data quality validation with Great Expectations and deploying a CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions.

Modeled raw API data into a dbt star schema in BigQuery, reducing analyst query time through BigQuery partitioning and clustering, demonstrating proficiency in dimensional modeling and data warehousing principles.

Collaborated with engineers, product managers, and business stakeholders to translate user feedback into production code, driving a 15% increase in feature adoption and ensuring alignment with business processes and objectives.

Monitored marketing campaign metrics and identified performance patterns to guide strategic decisions, increasing leads by 40%, with potential application to integrating and maintaining campaign marketing data from vendor platforms.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Data Engineer opportunity with Jobs via Dice. I am interested in this opportunity because Marici Solutions' focus on building and growing data products and data warehouses for acquisition marketing spend and campaign performance directly aligns with my passion for leveraging data to drive business outcomes. What interests me about working for Marici Solutions is your commitment to data quality and operational efficiency, which resonates deeply with my professional approach.

I believe my strong proficiency in SQL, Python, and Airflow, coupled with my hands-on experience in ETL pipeline development, would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on building robust, scalable, and efficient data solutions. In fact, in my role at Haven Technologies, I extracted and transformed data from REST APIs and relational databases, building structured, clean datasets that directly supported front-end feature development and reduced UI bugs. I utilized SQL queries to validate and synchronize data across systems, improving data accuracy by 60%. This experience directly translates to the need for developing and optimizing performant database, data model, integration, and ETL in RDBMS environments.

Ultimately, I know that the Data Engineer role at Marici Solutions would allow me to bring my expertise in SQL, Python, and ETL to designing and implementing scalable data solutions and contributing to the growth of your Data Products and Data Warehouses. Additionally, my project experience as a Data Analytics Fellow at COOP Careers enabled me to develop my data modeling and visualization skills. I built a production-grade ELT pipeline ingesting Federal Reserve economic data into Google BigQuery using Python, Airflow, dbt, and GCS, automating data quality validation with Great Expectations and deploying a CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions. This project showcased my ability to not only build pipelines but also ensure data quality and operational efficiency.

I’m excited by the opportunity to use my data modeling and ETL skills in working on acquisition marketing spend and campaign performance data at Marici Solutions. I know that my strong foundation in data engineering principles and my hands-on experience with modern cloud data warehousing solutions align with what it takes to succeed in the Data Engineer role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
